message:
style(tests): clippy/rustfmt cleanup in golden_metamorphic_search

Tidies two spots flagged by rustfmt/clippy in the metamorphic golden
suite:

- Re-wraps the `extract` closure in `golden_limit_prefix_ordering`
  with rustfmt's preferred brace placement (no semantic change).
- Converts the two `let mut filters_...` → assign pattern in
  `golden_days_filter_staircase` into functional struct-update syntax
  (`SearchFilters { created_from: Some(...), ..Default::default() }`),
  eliminating the `clippy::field_reassign_with_default` warnings.

No assertion changes, no new coverage — this is purely lint-driven
formatting and field-init hygiene.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
